issue_title: Fixed bug which highlighted non-active second-level page titles in menu in error and issue with ignore files
issue_body_preview: The side menu on the page template supports nested pages (e.g. Content > My Topic > My Subtopic > My Page), but when any of the pages in that submenu was active ALL of the page names in the submenu were highlighted in bold because the styling from the `.active` class was being inherited from the 1st
test_description_zh: 在侧边栏导航菜单中，打开一个包含多个二级子页面的分类目录，点击其中某一个子页面使其处于活跃状态，观察侧边栏菜单中该分类下所有子页面标题的样式表现。
expected_result_zh: 仅当前活跃（被选中）的子页面标题显示为加粗高亮样式，同一层级下的其他非活跃子页面标题应保持普通（非加粗、非高亮）样式，不应出现所有子页面同时被高亮加粗的情况。
